parentLoginSubtitle: Quick sign-in and registration for parents.
invalidAccessCode: That access code is not valid.
sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please log in again.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters.
emailRequiredSignup: Enter a valid email address to sign up.
writeDisabledSignup: Account creation is disabled in preview mode. Contact support when the global site opens for registrations.
guestUnavailable: Guest sign-in is not available right now.
askParentOpenAccount: Ask a parent to open an account for you
parentWelcomeBody: Here you can open a parent account, add your child, and let them enter the LEO KIDS learning area.
parentWelcomeAfter: After opening an account you can:
parentWelcomeBenefits: Add a child, view reports, and track learning progress and more
parentPolicyPrefix: By continuing to use Leo Kids, you agree to our
systemLoading: The system is still loading. Please try again in a moment.
signupCompleteVerify: Sign-up complete. After verifying your email, sign in.
signupSetupFailed: Account created but setup could not be completed. Try signing in.
loginSetupFailed: Sign-in succeeded but setup could not be completed. Try again.
googleSignInFailed: Could not complete Google sign-in. Try again or use email and password.
identifierPlaceholderParent: Enter email or username from your teacher
teacherPortalUnavailable: The teacher portal is not available right now.
teacherSystemPreparing: The system is still preparing. Try again in a few minutes.
teacherConnectionError: Connection error (client configuration missing). Refresh the page or contact support.
forgotPasswordSuccess: If an account exists with the address {email}, a reset link will be sent.
resetPasswordSuccess: Password updated. Redirecting to your portal…
resetPasswordErrorExpired: This reset link expired or was already used. Request a new link.
resetPasswordErrorNoSession: No valid reset session found. Open the link from your email again.
resetPasswordErrorSame: The new password must be different from the previous password.
resetPasswordErrorNetwork: Could not reach the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
resetPasswordErrorGeneric: Something went wrong updating your password. Try again.

teacher.title: Request account / access
teacher.explanationHint: Describe the access you need — private tutor, school representative, or another request.
teacher.inviteOnlyNote: Already have an account invited by our team? Sign in here. Need new access? Switch to the private tutor registration tab.
teacher.success: Your request was received. Our team will review it and contact you soon.
teacher.alreadyPending: A request is already pending approval.

school.title: School registration
school.success: Your registration request was received. Our team will review it and contact you soon.

pending.teacherBody: Your account/access request is pending approval. Our team will review it and update you soon.
pending.schoolHeading: Your school registration is pending approval
pending.schoolBody: Your school registration request was received. Once approved, you'll get access to the management portal.
pending.rejectedBody: Your request was declined. For more details, please contact support.

errors.submitFailed: Unable to submit the request right now. Please try again later.

guardian.loginTitle: Sign in to view the report
guardian.intro: Got login details from the teacher? Enter them here.
guardian.selectChild: Select a child to continue signing in.
guardian.selectChildPrompt: This account is linked to more than one child. Choose whose report to view:
guardian.accessExpired: Your access has expired or been revoked. Contact the teacher to renew it.
guardian.inviteInvalid: This link is invalid or has expired. Ask the teacher for a new link.
guardian.invalidCredentials: Incorrect username or code. Contact the teacher for updated details.

errors.invalidLoginCredentials: Incorrect login details. Check your email and password and try again.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email address before signing in. Check your inbox.
errors.userAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
errors.passwordTooShortProvider: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.signupPasswordRequired: Enter a valid password (at least 6 characters).
errors.invalidEmailFormat: That email address is not valid. Check it and try again.
errors.signupsDisabled: Sign-up is not available right now. Please try again later.
errors.rateLimitExceeded: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.connectionProblem: Connection problem. Check your internet and try again.
errors.signInFailedSupport: Sign-in failed. Please try again or contact support.
errors.signUpFailedSupport: Sign-up failed. Please try again or contact support.
errors.setupFailed: Account setup could not be completed. Please try again.
errors.pkceVerifierMissing: This sign-in link opened in a different browser profile. Open the link in the same browser where you started sign-in, or try again.

google.parentOnly: Google sign-in is available for parents only. Use the teacher or school portal.
google.identityRequired: We could not verify Google sign-in. Please try again.
google.connectionError: Connection problem. Check your internet and try again.
google.serverError: Server error. Please try again in a moment.
google.signInIncomplete: Could not complete sign-in. Please try again.
google.signInFailed: We couldn't finish Google sign-in. Try again or sign in with email and password.
google.credentialMissing: Could not complete Google sign-in. Please try again.
google.notConfigured: Google sign-in is not configured right now. Sign in with email and password.
google.loadFailed: Could not load Google sign-in right now. Please try again in a moment.
google.callbackError: Could not sign in with Google. Please try again.

copy.inviteSuccess: Message copied! Paste it into WhatsApp, email, or any messaging app.
copy.inviteError: We could not copy the message. Please try again.
copy.leoNumberSuccess: Leo Number copied! Paste it into WhatsApp, email, or any messaging app.
copy.leoNumberError: We could not copy the Leo Number. Please try again.

invite.parentMessage:
Hi,
Could you open a Leo Kids learning account for me?

Parent sign-up is here:
{url}

After you create a parent account, you can add me and get a username and login code.
